description: Intelligence & Learning System - Pattern recognition, genetic algorithm optimization, continuous learning, concept drift detection, and adaptive strategy evolution for autonomous trading improvement

userStories.title: Set up pattern recognition system foundation
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to set up a pattern recognition foundation to identify recurring price patterns and market regimes.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up pattern storage schema in database
Create unit tests for pattern recognition
Add integration tests with historical data
Document pattern types and detection methods

userStories.title: Implement support and resistance pattern detection
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to detect support and resistance levels to identify key price zones.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement local extrema detection (peaks and troughs)
Implement support level detection (multiple touches with bounce)
Implement resistance level detection (multiple touches with rejection)
Implement level strength scoring (based on touches and time)
Test support/resistance detection on historical data
Validate detected levels match manual analysis
userStories.notes: Support/resistance levels are key trading zones

userStories.title: Implement candlestick pattern recognition
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to recognize candlestick patterns for short-term trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement bullish patterns (hammer, engulfing, morning star)
Implement bearish patterns (shooting star, engulfing, evening star)
Test candlestick patterns on historical data

userStories.title: Implement market regime detection
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to detect market regimes (trending/ranging/volatile) to adapt trading strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement trend detection (ADX-based, moving average slope)
Implement ranging market detection (low volatility, sideways price)
Implement volatile regime detection (high ATR, large price swings)
Implement regime classification (bull trend, bear trend, ranging, volatile)
Implement regime persistence tracking (how long regime lasts)
Test regime detection on historical data
userStories.notes: Different strategies work best in different regimes

userStories.title: Implement pattern clustering with KMeans
userStories.description: As an AI system, I need to cluster similar price patterns to identify recurring market behaviors.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement feature extraction for pattern windows (20-50 bars)
Implement cluster labeling based on outcome (bullish/bearish)
Implement cluster prediction (which cluster current market is in)
userStories.notes: Pattern clustering identifies recurring market behaviors

userStories.title: Set up genetic algorithm optimizer foundation
userStories.description: As an evolving system, I need to set up a genetic algorithm foundation to optimize trading strategy parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GeneticOptimizer class using DEAP library
Define strategy parameters as genes (RSI period, MACD settings, ATR multiplier, etc.)
Implement fitness function (Sharpe ratio + win rate)
Set up genetic algorithm parameters (population size, generations, mutation rate)
Create unit tests for genetic algorithm
userStories.notes: Genetic algorithms optimize complex parameter spaces

userStories.title: Implement genetic algorithm operators
userStories.description: As an evolving system, I need to implement selection, crossover, and mutation operators for genetic optimization.
userStories.notes: Proper operators are critical for GA success

userStories.title: Implement genetic algorithm optimization workflow
userStories.description: As an evolving system, I need to implement the complete optimization workflow with evolution tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement generation tracking (best fitness, average fitness)
Implement convergence detection (stop if no improvement)
Generate optimization report (best parameters, fitness curve)

userStories.title: Set up continuous learning system foundation
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to set up a continuous learning foundation to retrain models with new data.
acceptanceCriteria: Set up learning trigger logic (performance degradation + minimum trades)
Implement data collection for retraining (new trades since last training)
Create unit tests for continuous learning
Add integration tests with model training
userStories.notes: Continuous learning adapts to changing markets

userStories.title: Implement concept drift detection
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to detect concept drift (changing market conditions) to trigger model retraining.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement distribution shift detection (feature distribution changes)
Implement statistical drift detection (KS test, Population Stability Index)
Test drift detection on simulated scenarios

userStories.title: Implement model retraining pipeline
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to implement an automated retraining pipeline to update models with new data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement incremental learning (update model with new data)
Implement full retraining (retrain from scratch with all data)
Implement A/B testing for new models (shadow mode)
Implement model rollback on performance degradation
Test retraining pipeline on simulated data

userStories.title: Implement model performance comparison and selection
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to compare model versions and select the best performing model.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement model comparison metrics (accuracy, Sharpe, win rate)
Implement model selection criteria (best performance + stability)
Test model selection on historical data

userStories.title: Implement adaptive strategy system
userStories.description: As an intelligent system, I need to adapt trading strategies based on market conditions and performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement strategy library (trend following, mean reversion, breakout)
Implement strategy selection based on market regime
Test strategy adaptation on historical data
Validate adaptive strategies outperform static strategies
userStories.notes: Different strategies work in different conditions

userStories.title: Implement learning rate scheduling and optimization
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to implement learning rate scheduling to optimize model training.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement learning rate schedules (constant, step decay, exponential decay)
Implement adaptive learning rate (reduce on plateau)
Implement learning rate range test (find optimal LR)
Log learning rate and loss curves
Test learning rate schedules on training data
Validate optimal learning rate improves convergence
userStories.notes: Learning rate optimization improves model quality

userStories.title: Implement memory and experience replay system
userStories.description: As a learning system, I need to implement a memory system to store and replay important trading experiences.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement experience storage (market state + action + outcome)
Implement experience replay buffer (circular buffer with prioritization)
Implement rare event memory (store black swan events)
Implement mistake library (store losing trades for analysis)
Implement memory retrieval (query by market conditions)
Store memory in database with embeddings
Test memory system on historical data
Validate memory retrieval finds relevant experiences
userStories.notes: Memory enables learning from past experiences

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must detect support/resistance levels with 70%+ accuracy
FR-2: System must classify market regimes (trending/ranging/volatile)
FR-3: System must optimize strategy parameters using genetic algorithms
FR-4: System must detect concept drift and trigger retraining
FR-5: System must implement continuous learning with weekly retraining
FR-6: System must adapt strategies based on market conditions
FR-7: System must store and replay important trading experiences
FR-8: System must compare model versions and select best performer
FR-9: System must implement pattern clustering for market behavior analysis
FR-10: System must track pattern success rates and adapt accordingly
nonGoals: No reinforcement learning in this phase (future enhancement)
No deep neural networks (LSTM, Transformer) in this phase
No transfer learning from other markets
No online learning (update model on every trade)
technicalConsiderations: Pattern recognition requires extensive validation (avoid false patterns)
Genetic algorithms are computationally expensive (run during off-hours)
Concept drift detection is critical for long-term success
Continuous learning must be stable (avoid catastrophic forgetting)
A/B testing new models prevents performance degradation
Market regime detection improves strategy selection
Memory system must be efficient (avoid storage bloat)
Adaptive strategies must be validated before deployment
Model rollback is essential for safety
Learning rate optimization improves model convergence
successMetrics: Pattern recognition achieves 70%+ accuracy on historical data
Genetic optimization improves Sharpe ratio by >10%
Concept drift detection triggers within 100 trades of degradation
Continuous learning maintains model accuracy within 5% of initial performance
Adaptive strategies outperform static strategies by >15%
Model selection consistently chooses best performing model
Memory retrieval finds relevant experiences for 80%+ of queries
Pattern clustering identifies 5-10 distinct market behaviors
System adapts to market changes within 1 week

architecture.patternFlow: Market Data → Pattern Detection → Validation → Storage → Matching → Signal Generation
architecture.optimizationFlow: Parameters → Backtesting → Fitness Evaluation → Selection → Crossover → Mutation → New Generation
architecture.learningFlow: New Data → Drift Detection → Retraining Trigger → Model Training → Validation → A/B Testing → Deployment
architecture.adaptationFlow: Market Regime → Strategy Selection → Parameter Adaptation → Execution → Performance Tracking → Adaptation

timeline.phase1: Foundation (Days 1-4): Pattern recognition setup, regime detection
timeline.phase3: Optimization (Days 9-12): Genetic algorithm setup, operators, workflow
timeline.phase4: Learning (Days 13-16): Concept drift, continuous learning, model selection
timeline.phase5: Adaptation (Days 17-20): Adaptive strategies, memory system, optimization
